currentFocus: v1.0.3 public WinUI ZIP release is published; next work resumes bounded patch/mod/runtime proof and contributor-readiness refinements from public main.

repositoryTruth.policy: public repo is primary for source/docs/tools/tests/RE notes/proof summaries/state; hard payloads remain local ignored overlays

publicPrimaryMigration.hardening: test:public-allowlist now chains hard-payload safety, submodule payload scan, and public-primary migration/hash inventory; public_allowlist_safety_check.py now checks more payload suffixes, magic bytes, raw-log-shaped text, JSONL text, exact fixture hashes, and missing/unreadable submodules.

publicPrimaryMigration.localStorageCleanup: C:\Users\david\source\Onslaught-Career-Editor-public-candidate* scratch clones were moved to G:\OnslaughtRepoArchives\source-scratch-20260624 with move-manifest.json; zero public-candidate scratch dirs remain on C:.

activeSlice.name: winui-zip-release-v1.0.3-closeout
activeSlice.goal: publish a contributor-ready public baseline and downloadable WinUI v1.0.3 ZIP after validation
activeSlice.claimBoundary: validated unsigned portable ZIP only; no game payload redistribution, no signed installer/MSIX/SmartScreen claim, no player-ready online multiplayer, no gameplay parity/rebuild parity proof
latestFindings: v1.0.3 release-candidate ZIP passed with friendly root wrapper layout, app/ payload, bundled lore-book/, extracted launch/Home/Lore/Media smokes, skipped-row rejection, and process cleanup.
Steam game-directory detection now rejects partial install folders and can read Steam libraryfolders.vdf through AppConfig test seams.
Asset Library and Media empty states now make local game/catalog requirements explicit rather than leaving users at no-content dead ends.
public_allowlist_safety_check.py now supports --payload-root so legacy curated export checks cannot silently call a missing mode.
